prompt: Edit this photograph. Keep the woman and her navy-and-white fine pinstripe sleeveless tiered maxi dress EXACTLY as they are: do not change, redraw, restyle or recolor the dress, its stripes, gathered neckline, ruched waist, tiers or hem, or her body, pose, hands, hair, face or black sandals. Preserve every fold and stripe precisely. Change ONLY the setting around her. Place her standing in a quiet whitewashed Cycladic (Milos) lane: chalky white plaster walls, a weathered blue-painted timber door beside her, a few worn stone steps, pale stone paving underfoot. Warm late-afternoon Mediterranean sunlight from one side, soft directional light, a realistic contact shadow grounding her where her feet meet the ground. Photorealistic, crisp natural focus throughout, a clean level realistic sea horizon if any sea shows, consistent warm light across the whole frame so she sits naturally in scene.
